overrides.expect: \mu (a, b) = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} (- 1) ^ {r} & \text {if \frac {b}{a} is the product of r distinct primes}, \\ 0 & \text {otherwise, i.e. if a\nmid b or \frac {b}{a} is not squarefree}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \mu (a, b) = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} (- 1) ^ {r} & \text {if $\frac {b}{a}$ is the product of $r$ distinct primes}, \\ 0 & \text {otherwise, i.e. if $a\nmid b$ or $\frac {b}{a}$ is not squarefree}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \mu (U, W) = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} (- 1) ^ {k} q ^ {\binom {k} {2}} & \text {if U\subseteq W and dim(W) - dim(U) = k}, \\ 0 & \text {if U\not\subseteq W}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \mu (U, W) = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} (- 1) ^ {k} q ^ {\binom {k} {2}} & \text {if $U\subseteq W$ and $\dim(W) - \dim(U) = k$}, \\ 0 & \text {if $U\not\subseteq W$.} \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: E _ {i} E _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} E _ {i} & \text {if i = j ,} \\ O & \text {if i\neq j ,} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: E _ {i} E _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} E _ {i} & \text {if } i = j , \\ O & \text {if } i\neq j , \end{array} \right.
